scripts.test: node ../e2e-gate.mjs --suite @feed/chroma-e2e --requires 'MetaMask extension (auto-downloaded) + keyless localnet stack on :3100 (anvil + contracts + app, auto-started by the playwright webServer harness)' -- playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts
scripts.lint: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched tools/chroma/package.json tools/chroma/tsconfig.json tools/chroma/playwright.config.ts
